name: Grilled Pumpkin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Peel and clean the pumpkin, then cut into slivers.
3. Combine the butter and herbs; season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Arrange the pumpkin slivers on a baking tray and spread with the herb butter mixture.
5. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until fork-tender. Baste the slivers with the butter as needed during baking.
6. Before serving, season again with salt and pepper to taste, and sprinkle with lemon juice.
7. Serve with fish fillets.
